event: impingement of vaginal vault mass on both the ureters
high white blood cell count of 16,760/mm3
tested positive for nitrates and leucocyte esterase
no trace of ingestion of medications/food items, poisonous materials and other causes such as haematuria or porphyria
started on empirical IV cefoperazone and sulbactam combination
urine culture grew a mixture of organisms
no improvement due to her disease burden and ongoing sepsis with multi-organ failure
advanced nature of the disease and poor prognosis
no aggressive treatment and preferred only palliative intent
delirious with increased breathlessness and fever spikes
